Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils

Class FormulaBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils.FormulaBuilder
public class FormulaBuilder extends Object
Builder class to create formulas in a simpler way than through FormulaFactory. This class is not exported. Methods can be added as needed.

    • ff

      private final FormulaFactory ff

  • Constructor Details

    • FormulaBuilder

      public FormulaBuilder(FormulaFactory ff)
      Creates the builder.
      Parameters:
      ff - formula factory to use to build formulas

  • Method Details

    • intType

      public IntegerType intType()
      Builds the integer type.
      Returns:
      the integer type

    • relType

      public PowerSetType relType(Type left, Type right)
      Builds a type corresponding to the set of all relations between two given types. The result is ℙ(left×right).
      Parameters:
      left - the left-hand side of the type
      right - the right-hand side of the type
      Returns:
      the relational type between the two given types

    • boundIdentDecl

      public BoundIdentDecl boundIdentDecl(String name, Type type)
      Builds a bound identifier with the given name and type.
      Parameters:
      name - name of the identifier
      type - type of the identifier
      Returns:
      the bound identifier with the given name and type

    • boundIdent

      public BoundIdentifier boundIdent(int index, Type type)
      Builds a bound identifier with the given index and type.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the identifier
      type - type of the identifier
      Returns:
      the bound identifier with the given index and type

    • exists

      public Predicate exists(BoundIdentDecl[] decls, Predicate pred)
      Builds an existential quantification.
      Parameters:
      decls - bound identifier declarations
      pred - quantified predicate
      Returns:
      existential quantification with the given identifiers and predicate

    • exists

      public Predicate exists(BoundIdentDecl decl, Predicate pred)
      Builds an existential quantification with a single bound identifier.
      Parameters:
      decl - bound identifier declaration
      pred - quantified predicate
      Returns:
      existential quantification with the given identifier and predicate

    • forall

      public Predicate forall(BoundIdentDecl[] decls, Predicate pred)
      Builds a universal quantification.
      Parameters:
      decls - bound identifier declarations
      pred - quantified predicate
      Returns:
      universal quantification with the given identifiers and predicate

    • forall

      public Predicate forall(BoundIdentDecl decl, Predicate pred)
      Builds a universal quantification with a single bound identifier.
      Parameters:
      decl - bound identifier declaration
      pred - quantified predicate
      Returns:
      universal quantification with the given identifier and predicate

    • cset

      public Expression cset(BoundIdentDecl[] decls, Predicate pred, Expression expr, QuantifiedExpression.Form form)
      Builds a comprehension set. Depending on form, the set can be: { expr ∣ pred }, { decls · pred ∣ expr } or λ decls · pred ∣ expr.
      Parameters:
      decls - bound identifier declarations
      pred - child predicate
      expr - child expression
      form - form the set
      Returns:
      comprehension set with the given identifiers, predicate, expression and form

    • cset

      public Expression cset(BoundIdentDecl decl, Predicate pred, Expression expr, QuantifiedExpression.Form form)
      Builds a comprehension set with a single bound identifier. Depending on form, the set can be: { expr ∣ pred }, { decl · pred ∣ expr } or λ decl · pred ∣ expr.
      Parameters:
      decl - bound identifier declaration
      pred - child predicate
      expr - child expression
      form - form the set
      Returns:
      comprehension set with the given identifier, predicate, expression and form

    • intLit

      public IntegerLiteral intLit(BigInteger i)
      Builds an integer literal.
      Parameters:
      i - value of the literal
      Returns:
      integer literal with the given value

    • bij

      public Expression bij(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a bijection.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the bijection left ⤖ right

    • upto

      public Expression upto(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds an interval set.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the set left..right

    • mapsTo

      public Expression mapsTo(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a maps to.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the expression left ↦ right

    • plus

      public Expression plus(Expression... children)
      Builds an addition.
      Parameters:
      children - children expressions
      Returns:
      the expression children[0] + children[1] + ...

    • mul

      public Expression mul(Expression... children)
      Builds a multiplication.
      Parameters:
      children - children expressions
      Returns:
      the expression children[0] ∗ children[1] ∗ ...

    • minus

      public Expression minus(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a subtraction.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the expression left − right

    • div

      public Expression div(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a division.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the expression left ÷ right

    • expn

      public Expression expn(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds an exponentiation.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the expression
      right - right-hand side of the expression
      Returns:
      the expression left ^ right

    • and

      public Predicate and(Predicate... preds)
      Builds a conjunction of predicates.
      Parameters:
      preds - predicates to conjunct
      Returns:
      conjunction of the given predicates

    • finite

      public Predicate finite(Expression expr)
      Builds a predicate for the finiteness of a set.
      Parameters:
      expr - set parameter
      Returns:
      the predicate finite(expr)

    • in

      public Predicate in(Expression element, Expression set)
      Builds a set membership predicate.
      Parameters:
      element - element to test
      set - set on which membership is tested
      Returns:
      the predicate element ∈ set

    • imp

      public Predicate imp(Predicate left, Predicate right)
      Builds a logical implication.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the implication
      right - right-hand side of the implication
      Returns:
      the predicate left ⇒ right

    • equal

      public Predicate equal(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds an equal relation.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the relation
      right - right-hand side of the relation
      Returns:
      the predicate left = right

    • notequal

      public Predicate notequal(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a not-equal relation. The not equal is returned normalised as the negation of an equality.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the relation
      right - right-hand side of the relation
      Returns:
      the predicate ¬ left = right

    • ge

      public Predicate ge(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a greater-or-equal relation.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the relation
      right - right-hand side of the relation
      Returns:
      the predicate left ≥ right

    • le

      public Predicate le(Expression left, Expression right)
      Builds a less-or-equal relation.
      Parameters:
      left - left-hand side of the relation
      right - right-hand side of the relation
      Returns:
      the predicate left ≤ right

    • or

      public Predicate or(Predicate... preds)
      Builds a disjunction of predicates.
      Parameters:
      preds - predicates to conjunct
      Returns:
      disjunction of the given predicates

    • not

      public Predicate not(Predicate pred)
      Builds the negation of a predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - predicate to negate
      Returns:
      negation of the given predicate
